title: ranunculus aduncus subsp. gouanii
intro: Ranunculus aduncus subsp. gouanii, also known as the Gouan's ranunculus, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The health benefits of Gouan's ranunculus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, burns, and minor injuries.
